body:
This PR removes dx from the Zalesak operator and adds it to the Hadley-like meridional circulation test case. I also updated the mass conservation check in the example, since they were erroneously considering only the tracer instead of the tracer mass. 

The error looks slightly larger with Zalesak compared to only 3rd-order-upwinding. 

This will also complete Task 3.3 in the SDI #851, and therefore, close #851

title: Zalesak FCT: remove dx and add it to Hadley circ test
